summary:
Final re-verification of MyMoney admin-index strip fix + regression check on the other four pages. All 6 expectations now pass. Fix at /app/frontend/src/pages/MyMoney.jsx line 300 ('
' inside the showAdminIndex branch right after
) is working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: The 'my-money-member-strip' wrapper now exists in BOTH render branches of MyMoney.jsx (admin index line 300 and personal ledger line 352). The two branches still duplicate the strip wrapper — a small future refactor could move it into the shared <Header> component to avoid drift, but functionally this fix is correct.
test_credentials: Fresh family TEST_AVH_<ts> per run via POST /api/auth/register. Admin Alice (PIN 1234) + child Tommy (PIN 3333). NOTE: /api/auth/member/select returns the member token under key 'member_token' (not 'access_token').
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth flow confirmed: POST /api/auth/register returns {access_token, token_type, account, family}. POST /api/family/members with account_token works for the FIRST admin member; subsequent members must use a member_token from /api/auth/member/select. /api/auth/member/select response key is 'member_token' (NOT 'access_token'). For SPA auth seed these localStorage keys: mfml_account_token, mfml_member_token, mfml_account (JSON string), mfml_family (JSON string), mfml_member (JSON string), mfml_auth_ok='true', mfml_lang='en'. All five page strips now resolve correctly: my-money-member-strip (both branches), wall-member-strip, tp-member-strip, budget-member-strip, family-members-member-strip.
